# MTC Renovations
> Hamilton's licensed renovation contractor. Basement, kitchen, bathroom, flooring, and interior painting. Serving Hamilton, Burlington, Oakville, and the GTA.

## Services
- [Basement Renovation Hamilton](https://www.mtcrenovations.ca/basement)
- [Kitchen Renovation Hamilton](https://www.mtcrenovations.ca/kitchen)
- [Bathroom Renovation Hamilton](https://www.mtcrenovations.ca/bathroom)
- [Flooring Installation Hamilton](https://www.mtcrenovations.ca/flooring)
- [Interior Painting Hamilton](https://www.mtcrenovations.ca/painting)
